framework.name: Agent-as-Employee IAM Analogy
framework.description: Emerging mental model treating AI agents as identity principals similar to employees, requiring policy enforcement 'as reliably as a vetted employee.' This suggests IAM-style authorization frameworks (roles, permissions, audit trails) rather than agent-specific protocols.
framework.raw_quote: if every agent is both a worker and a system, how do we ensure it obeys enterprise policy as reliably as a vetted employee?

source.title: Compliance for AI Agents: What Financial Services Organizations Need to Know - Banking Exchange
